data.name: Preferences_ThemeHelp
data.value: Choose between light and dark mode.

data.name: Preferences_LanguageHelp
data.value: Select your preferred language. The page will reload.

data.name: Preferences_GridPageSizeHelp
data.value: Number of rows shown per page in data grids.

data.name: Preferences_DensityHelp
data.value: Compact fits more on screen; standard gives more breathing room.

data.name: PublicHome_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Find and reserve the ideal space for your event

data.name: PublicHome_AboutText
data.value: Our booking platform allows you to easily find and reserve public spaces for your events, meetings, and activities.

data.name: SpaceDetail_NoDescription
data.value: No description available for this space.

data.name: SpaceDetail_TariffsPlaceholder
data.value: Tariff information will be available in a future update.

data.name: SpaceDetail_CtaText
data.value: Select a time slot on the availability calendar, then submit your request.

data.name: RequestDetail_NotFound
data.value: Request not found or you do not have access.

data.name: RequestDetail_AttachmentsPlaceholder
data.value: Document attachments will be available in a future update.

data.name: RequestDetail_MessagingPlaceholder
data.value: Messaging with the services team will be available in a future update.

data.name: RequestDetail_CancelDialogMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this request? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: RequestDetail_LoadError
data.value: An error occurred while loading the request. Please try again.

data.name: RequestDetail_CancelError
data.value: An error occurred while cancelling the request. Please try again.

data.name: RequestDetail_ExportError
data.value: An error occurred while exporting the calendar file.

data.name: Wizard_HelpText
data.value: Need help? Contact technical support or consult the user guide.

data.name: Wizard_SlotRequired
data.value: Start and end dates are required

data.name: Wizard_ConflictSummary
data.value: One or more conflicts were detected for the selected spaces and dates.

data.name: Wizard_Step1Subtitle
data.value: Describe your event and expected audience.

data.name: Wizard_Step2Subtitle
data.value: Select the spaces and equipment you need for your event.

data.name: Wizard_Step3Subtitle
data.value: Define the perimeter of your intervention on public domain.

data.name: Wizard_GisPlaceholder
data.value: GIS perimeter editor will be available in a future update.

data.name: Wizard_Step4Subtitle
data.value: Provide organizer and on-site contact information.

data.name: Wizard_SuccessMessage
data.value: Your request has been submitted successfully. You will receive a confirmation by email.

data.name: Wizard_SubmitFailed
data.value: An error occurred while submitting your request. Please try again later.

data.name: Wizard_SelectSpaceRequired
data.value: Please select a space for each booking

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_NotFound
data.value: Request not found or access denied.

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_FormSubmitted
data.value: Form data submitted (read-only view pending backend integration).

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_NoForm
data.value: No form was submitted with this request.

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_ResourceAllocationsAria
data.value: List of resource allocations for this request

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_MapAria
data.value: Map view of request location and perimeter

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_NoCommunication
data.value: No messages yet. Start the conversation below. (Preview — messages are not persisted)

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_MessagePlaceholder
data.value: Type a message to the requester...

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_ConfirmValidateMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to validate this request? The requester will be notified.

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_ConfirmRejectMessage
data.value: Please provide a reason for rejecting this request.

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_SupplementMessage
data.value: Describe the additional information needed from the requester.

data.name: AgentRequestDetail_AssignMessage
data.value: Enter the name of the agent to assign this request to.

data.name: AgentResources_DropHint
data.value: Drag a request here to schedule it later

data.name: AgentBlocks_ConflictSummary
data.value: {0} existing reservation(s) impacted by this block.

data.name: AgentBlocks_ErrorEndBeforeStart
data.value: End date must be after start date.
